diagram_title: Build-Mode Quiz Guard Admission — C4 Component Diagram

systems.name: LLM Session
systems.description: Model session that must answer the admission quiz before beta-sensitive execution continues.

containers.name: Session Runtime
containers.description: Mission, continuation, and build-mode orchestration runtime.

containers.name: Planner Tooling
containers.description: Plan entry/exit orchestration and approved mission materialization.

components.name: Plan Exit Admission Hook
components.description: Injects quiz guard admission before beta-sensitive build mode begins.

components.name: Quiz Guard Evaluator
components.description: Builds the expected answer key and evaluates structured quiz responses.

components.name: Build Admission Router
components.description: Routes pass, retry, or ask-user outcomes after quiz evaluation.

relationships.description: passes approved mission and build-entry context
asks structured quiz and receives answers
either admits build, permits one retry, or asks the user after repeated mismatch
